findings.title: S3 bucket access logging not enabled
findings.description: The S3 bucket does not have server access logging enabled.
findings.remediation: Add a logging configuration block to the aws_s3_bucket resource.

findings.title: S3 bucket not encrypted with KMS
findings.description: The S3 bucket uses default encryption (AES-256) instead of a customer-managed KMS key.
findings.remediation: Specify a KMS key ARN in the server_side_encryption_configuration.

findings.title: EC2 instance metadata service v2 not enforced
findings.description: IMDSv1 is still allowed, enabling SSRF-based credential theft.
findings.remediation: Set http_tokens = 'required' in the metadata_options block.

findings.title: Hardcoded AWS access key detected
findings.description: A potential AWS access key was found in the source code.
findings.remediation: Remove the credential from source and rotate the exposed key immediately.
